features.description: New orders will no longer be accepted after plan credits expire.
In the free plan, you can upload up to 50 products at a time.
Connect multiple Global Amazon accounts excluding Egypt, Saudi Arabia and Turkey.
Sync refund orders from Shopify to Amazon
Sync refund orders from Shopify to Amazon
Control or customize your inventory as per your need.
Manage your currency if selling in different regions
Link Shopify products with existing Amazon listings without hassle.
New orders will no longer be accepted after plan credits expire.
In the free plan, you can upload up to 50 products at a time.
Connect multiple Global Amazon accounts excluding Egypt, Saudi Arabia and Turkey.
Sync refund orders from Shopify to Amazon
Sync refund orders from Shopify to Amazon
Control or customize your inventory as per your need.
Manage your currency if selling in different regions
Link Shopify products with existing Amazon listings without hassle.
Continue receiving new orders after exhausting credits. $3 charge for every 10 orders synced beyond plan limit.
In the free plan, you can only upload up to 50 products at a time; however, in this plan, you can upload as many products as you need.

features.feature: Ads on top 10 SKU for a Month+ upto complimentary 40 skus optimisation )
Ads on top 20 SKU for a Month + upto 100 skus optimisation(complimentary)
Ads on top performing 100 SKU + upto 500 skus optimisation (Complimentary)
Ads on all top performing SKU + upto 1000 skus optimisation (Complimentary)
